sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bitwise (id INT, value1 INT, value2 INT);
INSERT INTO test_bitwise (id, value1, value2) VALUES (1, 17, 5);
INSERT INTO test_bitwise (id, value1, value2) VALUES (2, 8, 10);
UPDATE test_bitwise SET value2 = bit_xor(value1, value2) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, bit_xor(value1, value2) AS result FROM test_bitwise;
